title: An Act extending the time for the town of Boxford to grant 2 additional licenses for the sale of alcoholic beverages to be drunk on the premises

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Tarr, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2913) of Bruce E. Tarr and Tram T. Nguyen (by vote of the town) for legislation to extend the time for the town of Boxford to grant 2 additional licenses for the sale of alcoholic beverages to be drunk on the premises.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 02/04/2026 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in B-1
Bill reported favorably by committee and placed in the Orders of the Day for the next session
Taken out of the Orders of the Day
Read second, ordered to a third reading, read third and passed to be engrossed
Read; and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
Read second and ordered to a third reading
